name: Abediterol
description: Abediterol has been used in trials studying the treatment of Asthma, Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease (COPD), and Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease (COPD) and Asthma.

interactions.name: Vemurafenib
interactions.description: The risk or severity of QTc prolongation can be increased when Vemurafenib is combined with Abediterol.
